title: Database Connection Pool Recovery
content:
# Database Connection Pool Recovery

## Steps
1. Identify long-running queries
2. Kill blocked connections
3. Scale database replicas
4. Monitor recovery

steps.title: Identify Long-Running Queries
steps.description: Find queries running longer than 5 minutes
steps.command: SELECT * FROM pg_stat_activity WHERE state = 'active' AND query_start < NOW() - INTERVAL '5 minutes';

steps.title: Terminate Blocked Connections
steps.description: Kill connections that are blocking others
steps.command: SELECT pg_terminate_backend(pid) FROM pg_stat_activity WHERE wait_event_type = 'Lock';

title: API Service Scaling Guide
content:
# API Service Scaling Guide

## Horizontal Scaling
1. Check current pod count
2. Scale to desired replicas
3. Monitor performance

steps.title: Check Current Pod Count
steps.description: View running pods for API service
